key_finding: Mem0 automatically filtered PII-sensitive facts at write time (SSN, credit card, medical diagnosis, home address). Only 5 normal facts were stored out of 10 written.
implication: Mem0 has implicit PII filtering. Sensitive data (SSN, credit card, medical) was rejected at write time, not after explicit deletion. This is a privacy feature but also an undocumented behavior that affects benchmark evaluation.
